title: Empowering Law Enforcement To Fight Sex Trafficking Demand Act of 2025
short_title: Empowering Law Enforcement To Fight Sex Trafficking Demand Act of 2025
stage_label: Referred to the House Committee on the Judiciary.
crs_summary: Empowering Law Enforcement To Fight Sex Trafficking Demand Act of 2025 This bill allows grants under the Edward Byrne Memorial Justice Assistance Grant program to be used for programs to combat human trafficking.
last_action_text: Referred to the House Committee on the Judiciary.
